description: Accessing a sensitive API (camera, location, photos) without its Info.plist usage-description string, crashing the app at use.
body: Failure mode: the app calls a protected API but the required NSUsageDescription key is missing from Info.plist, so iOS terminates the app the moment it requests access. Detection signals: a hard crash exactly when a permission prompt would appear; a console message about a missing usage-description key; the crash only reproduces on the feature's first use. Do not access protected APIs without their usage string. Safer fallback: add a clear, specific usage-description string for every sensitive API used, request authorization in context at point of use, handle denial gracefully, and verify no missing-string crash before submission.
